text: Now the word<S>1697</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S> came unto Jonah<S>3124</S> the son<S>1121</S> of Amittai<S>573</S>, saying<S>559</S>,

Arise<S>6965</S>, go<S>3212</S> to Nineveh<S>5210</S>, that great<S>1419</S> city<S>5892</S>, and cry<S>7121</S> against it<S>7451</S>; for their wickedness is come up<S>5927</S> before me<S>6440</S>.

But Jonah<S>3124</S> rose up<S>6965</S> to flee<S>1272</S> unto Tarshish<S>8659</S> from the presence<S>6440</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S>; and he went down<S>3381</S> to Joppa<S>3305</S>, and found<S>4672</S> a ship<S>591</S> going<S>935</S> to Tarshish<S>8659</S>: so he paid<S>5414</S> the fare<S>7939</S> thereof<S>3381</S>, and went down into it<S>935</S>, to go with them unto Tarshish<S>8659</S> from the presence<S>6440</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S>.

But Jehovah<S>3068</S> sent out<S>2904</S> a great<S>1419</S> wind<S>7307</S> upon the sea<S>3220</S>, and there was a mighty<S>1419</S> tempest<S>5591</S> on the sea<S>3220</S>, so that the ship<S>591</S> was like<S>2803</S> to be broken<S>7665</S>.

Then the mariners<S>4419</S> were afraid<S>3372</S>, and cried<S>2199</S> every man<S>376</S> unto his god<S>430</S>; and they cast forth<S>2904</S> the wares<S>3627</S> that were in the ship<S>591</S> into the sea<S>3220</S>, to lighten<S>7043</S> it unto them<S>3124</S>. But Jonah was gone down<S>3381</S> into the innermost parts<S>3411</S> of the ship<S>5600</S>; and he lay<S>7901</S>, and was fast asleep<S>7290</S>.

So the shipmaster<S>7227</S> came<S>7126</S> to him<S>559</S>, and said unto him<S>7290</S>, What meanest thou, O sleeper? arise<S>6965</S>, call<S>7121</S> upon thy God<S>430</S>, if so be that God<S>430</S> will think<S>6245</S> upon us<S>6</S>, that we perish not.

And they said<S>559</S> every one<S>376</S> to his fellow<S>7453</S>, Come<S>3212</S>, and let us cast<S>5307</S> lots<S>1486</S>, that we may know<S>3045</S> for whose cause<S>7945</S> this evil<S>7451</S> is upon us<S>5307</S>. So they cast lots<S>1486</S>, and the lot<S>1486</S> fell<S>5307</S> upon Jonah<S>3124</S>.

Then said<S>559</S> they unto him<S>5046</S>, Tell us<S>7451</S>, we pray thee, for whose cause this evil is upon us<S>4399</S>; what is thine occupation? and whence<S>370</S> comest<S>935</S> thou<S>776</S>? what is thy country? and of what people art thou<S>5971</S>?

And he said<S>559</S> unto them<S>5680</S>, I am a Hebrew; and I fear<S>3373</S> Jehovah<S>3068</S>, the God<S>430</S> of heaven<S>8064</S>, who hath made<S>6213</S> the sea<S>3220</S> and the dry land<S>3004</S>.

Then were the men<S>582</S> exceedingly<S>1419</S> afraid<S>3372</S>, and said<S>559</S> unto him<S>6213</S>, What is this that thou hast done? For the men<S>582</S> knew<S>3045</S> that he was fleeing<S>1272</S> from the presence<S>6440</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S>, because he had told them<S>5046</S>.

Then said<S>559</S> they unto him<S>6213</S>, What shall we do unto thee<S>3220</S>, that the sea may be calm<S>8367</S> unto us<S>3220</S>? for the sea grew<S>1980</S> more and more tempestuous<S>5590</S>.

And he said<S>559</S> unto them<S>5375</S>, Take me up, and cast me forth<S>2904</S> into the sea<S>3220</S>; so shall the sea<S>3220</S> be calm<S>8367</S> unto you<S>3045</S>: for I know that for my sake<S>7945</S> this great<S>1419</S> tempest is upon you<S>5591</S>.

Nevertheless the men<S>582</S> rowed hard<S>2864</S> to get<S>7725</S> them back to the land<S>3004</S>; but they could<S>3201</S> not<S>3220</S>: for the sea grew<S>1980</S> more and more tempestuous against them<S>5590</S>.

Wherefore they cried<S>7121</S> unto Jehovah<S>3068</S>, and said<S>559</S>, We beseech thee<S>577</S>, O Jehovah<S>3068</S>, we beseech thee<S>6</S>, let us not perish for this man<S>376</S>'s life<S>5315</S>, and lay<S>5414</S> not upon us innocent<S>5355</S> blood<S>1818</S>; for thou<S>3068</S>, O Jehovah, hast done<S>6213</S> as it pleased thee<S>2654</S>.
So they took up<S>5375</S> Jonah<S>3124</S>, and cast him forth<S>2904</S> into the sea<S>3220</S>; and the sea<S>3220</S> ceased<S>5975</S> from its raging<S>2197</S>.
Then the men<S>582</S> feared<S>3372</S> Jehovah<S>3068</S> exceedingly<S>1419</S>; and they offered<S>2076</S> a sacrifice<S>2077</S> unto Jehovah<S>3068</S>, and made<S>5087</S> vows<S>5088</S>.

And Jehovah<S>3068</S> prepared<S>4487</S> a great<S>1419</S> fish<S>1709</S> to swallow up<S>1104</S> Jonah<S>3124</S>; and Jonah<S>3124</S> was in the belly<S>4578</S> of the fish<S>1709</S> three<S>7969</S> days<S>3117</S> and three<S>7969</S> nights<S>3915</S>.
Then Jonah<S>3124</S> prayed<S>6419</S> unto Jehovah<S>3068</S> his God<S>430</S> out of the fish<S>1710</S>'s belly<S>4578</S>.

And he said<S>559</S>, I called<S>7121</S> by reason of mine affliction<S>6869</S> unto Jehovah<S>3068</S>, And he answered<S>6030</S> me<S>990</S>; Out of the belly of Sheol<S>7585</S> cried<S>7768</S> I<S>8085</S>, And thou heardest my voice<S>6963</S>.

For thou didst cast<S>7993</S> me into the depth<S>4688</S>, in the heart<S>3824</S> of the seas<S>3220</S>, And the flood<S>5104</S> was round<S>5437</S> about me<S>1530</S>; All thy waves and thy billows<S>4867</S> passed over me<S>5674</S>.
And I said<S>559</S>, I am cast out<S>1644</S> from before thine eyes<S>5869</S>; Yet I will look<S>5027</S> again<S>3254</S> toward thy holy<S>6944</S> temple<S>1964</S>.

The waters<S>4325</S> compassed me about<S>661</S>, even to the soul<S>5315</S>; The deep<S>8415</S> was round about<S>5437</S> me<S>5488</S>; The weeds were wrapped about<S>2280</S> my head<S>7218</S>.

I went down<S>3381</S> to the bottoms<S>7095</S> of the mountains<S>2022</S>; The earth<S>776</S> with its bars<S>1280</S> closed upon me for ever<S>5769</S>: Yet hast thou brought up<S>5927</S> my life<S>2416</S> from the pit<S>7845</S>, O Jehovah<S>3068</S> my God<S>430</S>.
When my soul<S>5315</S> fainted<S>5848</S> within me<S>2142</S>, I remembered Jehovah<S>3068</S>; And my prayer<S>8605</S> came in<S>935</S> unto thee<S>6944</S>, into thy holy temple<S>1964</S>.
They that regard<S>8104</S> lying<S>7723</S> vanities<S>1892</S> Forsake<S>5800</S> their own mercy<S>2617</S>.

But I will sacrifice<S>2076</S> unto thee with the voice<S>6963</S> of thanksgiving<S>8426</S>; I will pay<S>7999</S> that which I have vowed<S>5087</S>. Salvation<S>3444</S> is of Jehovah<S>3068</S>.
And Jehovah<S>3068</S> spake<S>559</S> unto the fish<S>1709</S>, and it vomited out<S>6958</S> Jonah<S>3124</S> upon the dry land<S>3004</S>.
And the word<S>1697</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S> came unto Jonah<S>3124</S> the second<S>8145</S> time<S>559</S>, saying,
Arise<S>6965</S>, go<S>3212</S> unto Nineveh<S>5210</S>, that great<S>1419</S> city<S>5892</S>, and preach<S>7121</S> unto it the preaching<S>7150</S> that I bid thee<S>1696</S>.

So Jonah<S>3124</S> arose<S>6965</S>, and went<S>3212</S> unto Nineveh<S>5210</S>, according to the word<S>1697</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S>. Now Nineveh<S>5210</S> was an exceeding<S>430</S> great<S>1419</S> city<S>5892</S>, of three<S>7969</S> days<S>3117</S>' journey<S>4109</S>.

And Jonah<S>3124</S> began<S>2490</S> to enter<S>935</S> into the city<S>5892</S> a<S>259</S> day<S>3117</S>'s journey<S>4109</S>, and he cried<S>7121</S>, and said<S>559</S>, Yet forty<S>705</S> days<S>3117</S>, and Nineveh<S>5210</S> shall be overthrown<S>2015</S>.

And the people<S>582</S> of Nineveh<S>5210</S> believed<S>539</S> God<S>430</S>; and they proclaimed<S>7121</S> a fast<S>6685</S>, and put<S>3847</S> on sackcloth<S>8242</S>, from the greatest<S>1419</S> of them even to the least of them<S>6996</S>.

And the tidings<S>1697</S> reached<S>5060</S> the king<S>4428</S> of Nineveh<S>5210</S>, and he arose<S>6965</S> from his throne<S>3678</S>, and laid<S>5674</S> his robe<S>155</S> from him<S>3680</S>, and covered him with sackcloth<S>8242</S>, and sat<S>3427</S> in ashes<S>665</S>.

And he made proclamation<S>2199</S> and published<S>559</S> through Nineveh<S>5210</S> by the decree<S>2940</S> of the king<S>4428</S> and his nobles<S>1419</S>, saying<S>559</S>, Let neither man<S>120</S> nor beast<S>929</S>, herd<S>1241</S> nor flock<S>6629</S>, taste<S>2938</S> anything<S>3972</S>; let them not feed<S>7462</S>, nor drink<S>8354</S> water<S>4325</S>;

but let them be covered<S>3680</S> with sackcloth<S>8242</S>, both man<S>120</S> and beast<S>929</S>, and let them cry<S>7121</S> mightily<S>2394</S> unto God<S>430</S>: yea<S>7725</S>, let them turn every one<S>376</S> from his evil<S>7451</S> way<S>1870</S>, and from the violence<S>2555</S> that is in his hands<S>3709</S>.
Who knoweth<S>3045</S> whether God<S>430</S> will not turn<S>7725</S> and repent<S>5162</S>, and turn away<S>7725</S> from his fierce<S>2740</S> anger<S>639</S>, that we perish not<S>6</S>?

And God<S>430</S> saw<S>7200</S> their works<S>4639</S>, that they turned<S>7725</S> from their evil<S>7451</S> way<S>1870</S>; and God<S>430</S> repented<S>5162</S> of the evil<S>7451</S> which he said<S>1696</S> he would do<S>6213</S> unto them<S>6213</S>; and he did it not.
But it displeased<S>3415</S> Jonah<S>3124</S> exceedingly<S>1419</S>, and he was angry<S>2734</S>.

And he prayed<S>6419</S> unto Jehovah<S>3068</S>, and said<S>559</S>, I pray<S>577</S> thee<S>3068</S>, O Jehovah, was not this my saying<S>1697</S>, when I was yet in my country<S>127</S>? Therefore I hasted<S>1272</S> to<S>6923</S> flee unto Tarshish<S>8659</S>; for I knew<S>3045</S> that thou art a gracious<S>2587</S> God<S>410</S>, and merciful<S>7349</S>, slow<S>750</S> to anger<S>639</S>, and abundant<S>7227</S> in lovingkindness<S>2617</S>, and repentest<S>5162</S> thee of the evil<S>7451</S>.
Therefore now<S>3068</S>, O Jehovah, take<S>3947</S>, I beseech thee<S>5315</S>, my life from me<S>2896</S>; for it is better for me to die<S>4194</S> than to live<S>2416</S>.
And Jehovah<S>3068</S> said<S>559</S>, Doest thou well<S>3190</S> to be angry<S>2734</S>?

Then Jonah<S>3124</S> went out<S>3318</S> of the city<S>5892</S>, and sat<S>3427</S> on the east side<S>6924</S> of the city<S>5892</S>, and there made<S>6213</S> him a booth<S>5521</S>, and sat<S>3427</S> under it in the shade<S>6738</S>, till he might see<S>7200</S> what would become of the city<S>5892</S>.

And Jehovah<S>3068</S> God<S>430</S> prepared<S>4487</S> a gourd<S>7021</S>, and made it to come up<S>5927</S> over Jonah<S>3124</S>, that it might be a shade<S>6738</S> over his head<S>7218</S>, to deliver<S>5337</S> him from his evil<S>7451</S> case<S>3124</S>. So Jonah was exceeding<S>1419</S> glad<S>8055</S> because of the gourd<S>7021</S>.
But God<S>430</S> prepared<S>4487</S> a worm<S>8438</S> when the morning<S>7837</S> rose<S>5927</S> the next day<S>4283</S>, and it smote<S>5221</S> the gourd<S>7021</S>, that it withered<S>3001</S>.

And it came to pass<S>8121</S>, when the sun arose<S>2224</S>, that God<S>430</S> prepared<S>4487</S> a sultry<S>2759</S> east<S>6921</S> wind<S>7307</S>; and the sun<S>8121</S> beat<S>5221</S> upon the head<S>7218</S> of Jonah<S>3124</S>, that he fainted<S>5968</S>, and requested<S>7592</S> for himself<S>5315</S> that he might die<S>4191</S>, and said<S>559</S>, It is better<S>2896</S> for me to die<S>4194</S> than to live<S>2416</S>.

And God<S>430</S> said<S>559</S> to Jonah<S>3124</S>, Doest thou well<S>3190</S> to be angry<S>2734</S> for the gourd<S>7021</S>? And he said<S>559</S>, I do well<S>3190</S> to be angry<S>2734</S>, even unto death<S>4194</S>.

And Jehovah<S>3068</S> said<S>559</S>, Thou hast had regard<S>2347</S> for the gourd<S>7021</S>, for which thou hast not labored<S>5998</S>, neither madest it grow<S>1431</S>; which came up in a night<S>1121</S>, and perished<S>6</S> in a night<S>1121</S>:

and should not I have regard<S>2347</S> for Nineveh<S>5210</S>, that great<S>1419</S> city<S>5892</S>, wherein are<S>3426</S> more<S>7235</S> than sixscore<S>8147</S> thousand<S>7239</S> persons<S>120</S> that cannot discern<S>3045</S> between their right hand<S>3225</S> and their left hand<S>8040</S>; and also much<S>7227</S> cattle<S>929</S>?
